metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1883
metadata.comment:
Rationale: 9/11/2017 Pim

Fig. 7: BAI1 interacts with cell polarity machinery.
Fig.9: Loss of BAI1 alters Rac1 activation and F-actin in hippocampal neurons.
Fig.10: BAI1 interaction with Par3/Tiam1 is required for spinogenesis and Par3 localization.
Fi.g11: BAI1 signals to Rac1 through Tiam1.. Experimental description: Experiments were done in mouse and rats
Literal "Hippocampal neurons were cultured from E19 Long-Evans rats as described previously.
"In utero electroporation was performed as described previously (Hedstrom et al.,2007). We introduced shRNA or vector plasmids
together with pCx-EGFP (CAG promoterdriving EGFP expression) into ICR mice
(Charles River) at E14.

9/11/2017 Pim
- Overexpressed BAI1 protein is of human species; "Human BAI1 was obtained from Y. Nakamura (University of Tokyo) ". Since endogenous rat protein was also visualized annotation is made against rat species.
